findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Direct uses of eval/exec/compile in Pillow
 * @description Finds all direct calls to Python dynamic code execution primitives in the Pillow package.
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning
 * @id py/pillow-direct-eval-uses
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-094
 *       external/cwe/cwe-095
 */

import python
import semmle.python.ApiGraphs

from DataFlow::CallCfgNode call
where call = API::builtin(["eval", "exec", "compile"]).getACall()
select call, "Dynamic code execution primitive is used here."
findings.hypothesis: Pillow may use eval/exec/compile directly for expression evaluation (e.g., in ImageMath).

message.text: Dynamic code execution primitive is used here.
Dynamic code execution primitive is used here.
Dynamic code execution primitive is used here.

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name All eval/exec/compile uses in Pillow runtime code
 * @description Lists all dynamic code execution primitive uses in the Pillow library (excluding setup and tooling).
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning
 * @id py/pillow-direct-eval-uses
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-094
 *       external/cwe/cwe-095
 */

import python
import semmle.python.ApiGraphs

from DataFlow::CallCfgNode call
where
  call.getLocation().getFile().getRelativePath().matches("src/PIL/%") and
  call = API::builtin(["eval", "exec", "compile"]).getACall()
select call, "Dynamic code execution primitive is used here."
findings.hypothesis: Identify all direct uses of eval/exec/compile in Pillow runtime code to scope potential code injection risks.

message.text: Dynamic code execution primitive is used here.

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Pillow ImageMath expression evaluation sinks
 * @description Identify eval/exec/compile calls in PIL.ImageMath that may evaluate image expressions.
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning
 * @id py/pillow-imagemath-eval-sinks
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-094
 *       external/cwe/cwe-095
 */

import python
import semmle.python.ApiGraphs

from DataFlow::CallCfgNode call
where
  call.getLocation().getFile().getRelativePath() = "src/PIL/ImageMath.py" and
  call = API::builtin(["eval", "exec", "compile"]).getACall()
select call, "Dynamic code execution primitive is used in ImageMath expression handling here."
findings.hypothesis: Locate dynamic code execution primitives inside ImageMath implementation

message.text: Dynamic code execution primitive is used in ImageMath expression handling here.
